description: Experian UK provides consumer credit-related services in the UK, including account access and credit information products. On the `experiancs.co.uk` domain, the only verified developer-facing interface found was an MCP server endpoint.
summary: Experian UK exposes a public MCP server at `https://openai-app.experiancs.co.uk/mcp`; no other public developer integration surfaces were found on `experiancs.co.uk`.
